releases.name: InfraNodus AI Graph View 0.9.10

releases.author: deemeetree
releases.description:
Visualize connections between your ideas and pages in Obsidian as a knowledge graph. 

Reveal the main topics and gaps between them, generate new ideas using AI based on the blind spots you find.

To use in your Obsidian (desktop or mobile), get this plugin in the official Obsidian community plugin store. Or create the `.obsidian/plugins/infranodus-obsidian` folder in your Obsidian vault and copy the 3 files `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` to that folder. Then activate the community plugins.

You can use the plugin for free until you hit the AI / API token limit. If you'd like using it longer, you can go to https://infranodus.com/api-access and get the API token to extend your quota.

### Version 0.9.8 Update
13 May 2026
- bring the plugin in accordance with the new Obsidian plugin framework

### Version 0.9.7 Update
12 May 2026
- fix loading errors and improve error messages
- add ability to navigate to selected nodes
- add ability to search all selected nodes

### Version 0.9.5 Update
8 May 2026
- make default mode "manual" so the pages are not reloaded when changing view
- integrate the new updated 3D graph module
- call chat panel from the graph module interface

### Version 0.9.4 Update
6 January 2026
- do not reload a page on text change automatically in the default "automatic" mode
- better error treatment in case of hitting API and free usage limits

### Version 0.9.3 Update
3 December 2025
- add new AI models from Claude, Google, and X (Grok)

### Version 0.9.2 Updates
30 November 2025
- fix bug where AI chat was not working properly
- improved AI responses featuring GraphRAG functionality

### Version 0.9.1 Updates 
7 August 2025
- support the new InfraNodus API token system
- make the "graph" panel the default one instead of the "topics"
- improve stability when loading AI topics
- improve error handling and remove console errors

### Version 0.9.0 Updates 
25 March 2025
- added a view that emulates the Obsidian graph view (connections between the pages mentioned in the context) — can be selected in Settings. Good for using on folders as it emphasizes connections between the pages that have [[wiki links]]. We still recommend to use the default view for specific page analysis.
- AI-generated summary for each topical cluster identified in the graph. To use: select Topics > Summary.
- extended GraphRAG capabilities: use it to select certain clusters and nodes in the graph and to interact with those parts using the graph
- longer AI responses (ideas, summaries, and AI Chat mode)
- better quality generation of the names for topical clusters

To use in your Obsidian (desktop or mobile), get this plugin in the Obsidian community plugin store. Or create the `.obsidian/plugins/infranodus-obsidian` folder in your Obsidian vault and copy the 3 files `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` to that folder. Then activate the community plugins.

You can use the plugin for free until you hit the AI / API token limit. If you'd like using it longer, you can go to https://infranodus.com/api-access and get the API token to extend your quota.

### Version 0.9.1 Updates 
7 August 2025
- support the new InfraNodus API token system
- make the "graph" panel the default one instead of the "topics"
- improve stability when loading AI topics
- improve error handling and remove console errors

### Version 0.9.0 Updates (current)
25 March 2025
- added a view that emulates the Obsidian graph view (connections between the pages mentioned in the context) — can be selected in Settings. Good for using on folders as it emphasizes connections between the pages that have [[wiki links]]. We still recommend to use the default view for specific page analysis.

- update 3D graph view
releases.name: InfraNodus Obsidian Graph View Plugin

releases.author: deemeetree
releases.description:
Visualize connections between your ideas and pages in Obsidian, reveal the main topics and gaps between them, generate new ideas using AI based on the blind spots you find.

To use in your Obsidian (desktop or mobile), get this plugin in the Obsidian community plugin store. Or create the `.obsidian/plugins/infranodus-obsidian` folder in your Obsidian vault and copy the 3 files `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` to that folder. Then activate the community plugins.

To get the API code, go to https://infranodus.com/api-access or copy the token value at https://infranodus.com/api/v1/token after you log in to InfraNodus.

### Version 0.9.0 Updates (current)
25 March 2025
- added a view that emulates the Obsidian graph view (connections between the pages mentioned in the context) — can be selected in Settings. Good for using on folders as it emphasizes connections between the pages that have [[wiki links]]. We still recommend to use the default view for specific page analysis.
- AI-generated summary for each topical cluster identified in the graph. To use: select Topics > Summary.
- extended GraphRAG capabilities: use it to select certain clusters and nodes in the graph and to interact with those parts using the graph
- longer AI responses (ideas, summaries, and AI Chat mode)
- better quality generation of the names for topical clusters

### Version 0.8.8 Updates 
21 February 2025
- add a setting which links page name to all the pages mentioned inside (to mimick default Obsidian graph view) - opt in
- improve navigation using the graph
- do not create new tabs when navigating to pages
- better search during navigation (do not default to underscore for spaces)
- update 3D graph view

### Version 0.8.7 Updates 
10 January 2025
- better error handling

### Version 0.8.6 Updates
10 January 2025
- add bookmarks analysis
- add ability to confirm the name of the InfraNodus context where data is exported
- fix bug where the graph reloaded even in manual mode
- bug and design fixes

releases.name: InfraNodus Obsidian Graph View Plugin

releases.author: deemeetree
releases.description:
Visualize connections between your ideas and pages in Obsidian, reveal the main topics and gaps between them, generate new ideas using AI.

To use in your Obsidian (desktop of mobile), create the `.obsidian/plugins/infranodus-obsidian` folder in your Obsidian vault and copy the 3 files `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` to that folder. Then activate the community plugins.

To get the API code, go to https://infranodus.com/subscription or copy the token value at https://infranodus.com/api/v1/token after you log in InfraNodus.

### Version 0.8.7 Updates
better error handling

### Version 0.8.6 Updates
add bookmarks analysis
add ability to confirm the name of the InfraNodus context where data is exported
fix bug where the graph reloaded even in manual mode
bug and design fixes


### Version 0.8.4 Updates
fix bugs with context statements display
fix bugs with linked and unlinked mentions analysis


### Version 0.8.1 Updates
the new AI metaprompting feature
better AI contextualization based on the graph
the new graph module compatibility
UI improvements
better error handling
